ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood characteristics */,
  "average_medv" REAL /* Average median value of homes in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "pct_college_educated" REAL /* Percentage of residents with a college education */,
  "pct_employed" REAL /* Percentage of employed residents */,
  "pct_owners" REAL /* Percentage of property owners */,
  "pct_renters" REAL /* Percentage of property renters */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "school_quality" TEXT /* Quality of schools in the neighborhood (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Availability of public transportation (e.g., bus, subway) */,
  "green_spaces" TEXT /* Availability of green spaces (e.g., parks, open areas) */,
  "neighborhood_type" TEXT /* Type of neighborhood (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_stats" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood related to the crime */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded crime statistics */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported in the neighborhood */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes reported */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes reported */,
  "homicides" INTEGER /* Number of homicides reported */,
  "assaults" INTEGER /* Number of assaults reported */,
  "thefts" INTEGER /* Number of thefts reported */,
  "vandalism" INTEGER /* Number of vandalism incidents reported */,
  "arson" INTEGER /* Number of arson incidents reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_stats_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood related to the tax rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax rate record */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Full-value property tax rate */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Property tax rate */,
  "school_tax" REAL /* School tax rate */,
  "city_tax" REAL /* City tax rate */,
  "county_tax" REAL /* County tax rate */,
  "state_tax" REAL /* State tax rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, trend report) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
